changes.reason: Batch G stale/no-0DTE fallback isolation. breakout_long_no_0dte stale trades are the weakest active fallback slice: 2 trades, only $71 PnL, 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE. Raising the ES-only fallback slope from 0.08 to 0.10 tests whether stronger trend confirmation filters stale-map breakout exposure without touching VALID_0DTE profiles.

Same fallback family. The expired 0DTE breakout winner had strong structure and high ADX, while stale fallback quality is low-efficiency. Moving structure from 4 to 5 is a narrow ES-only quality requirement for missing/stale/expired fallback routing, not an option-data relaxation.

Compress the breakout no-0DTE target from 3 to 2.5 so any surviving stale fallback entries monetize faster. This is intended to reduce exposure time in the low-efficiency stale slice while preserving the profile as a fallback rather than disabling it.

expected_effect: Expected to reduce low-quality STALE_0DTE fallback exposure and improve fallback PnL/exposure while leaving VALID_0DTE pullback, charm-pin, squeeze, and charm-wall engines unchanged. Main tradeoff is losing one or two profitable but inefficient stale fallback winners; reject if total net profit falls more than 2%, fallback PnL turns negative, or the single EXPIRED_0DTE breakout winner is lost without offsetting exposure/MAE improvement.
label: promote
rationale: Choose Batch G because the current leader is already strong and broad VALID_0DTE pruning is too expensive. The weakest separable slice is no-0DTE stale fallback, especially breakout_long_no_0dte: 2 stale trades, $71 PnL, 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE. This is one logical family, uses only routed fallback profile keys, and avoids option-confirmed profiles when 0DTE data is stale or unavailable.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY breakout fallback contributes $1305 over 20 trades, but prior direct 1DTE tightening hurt score and net profit. That suggests a companion split, not stricter breakout_long_1dte thresholds.
strategy_hypotheses.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Router overlap may cannibalize profitable breakout_long_1dte trades or the companion profile may be unreachable.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state resembles pullback/reclaim rather than breakout continuation.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL remains >= current $1305, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -123.9, total net profit remains >=98% of leader, and score is flat or better.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long contributes $1237.7 over 34 trades with fast median hold, but owns the -527 worst MAE. Protected extended-VWAP winners have median MAE around -14.9 and resolve quickly, so static config filters are too blunt.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Can overfit a small number of delayed recoveries or block clean high-extension winners unless protected fast-winner retention is explicitly validated.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension or recent-high-rejection entries that fail to show early positive progress after entry.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners, total net profit >=98% of leader, and no new slow >=12h exposure.

new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= current $1305, 1DTE average MAE improves versus -123.9, total net profit >=98% of leader, and total score does not degrade.

new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Retain >=90% pullback_long PnL while improving pullback worst MAE from -403.2 and keeping total PnL/exposure hour flat or better.

new_strategy_ideas.name: Call Wall Acceptance Holdout Expansion
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: At least 3 additional trades with positive standalone PnL, profile PnL/exposure >=250, worst MAE <= -150, and total net profit >=98% of leader.

next_experiments.config_bias: Activate exactly one dormant valid-0DTE pin-avoid profile through the valid-0DTE router list and keep tuning minimal. Treat this as an attribution/split experiment, not a replac...
next_experiments.name: Dormant Pin-Avoid Router Split Probe
next_experiments.primary_metric: Combined charm-pin/charm-wall/pin-avoid PnL, worst MAE, protected fast-winner retention, and total risk-adjusted score.

next_experiments.config_bias: Add or activate a companion 1DTE pullback concept if legal. Leave breakout_long_1dte thresholds stable because prior direct tightening failed.
next_experiments.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Split
next_experiments.primary_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL, 1DTE average MAE, total net profit retention, and total score.

next_experiments.config_bias: Use only narrow boundary nudges around the already-enabled extended-VWAP rejection family. Avoid broad ES-VWAP max-distance, setup-quality floors, or global structure gates.
next_experiments.name: Extended-VWAP Threshold-Miss Boundary Study
next_experiments.primary_metric: Worst MAE, retained total PnL >=98%, retained extended-VWAP protected winners >=90%, and score.

next_experiments.config_bias: Keep pullback_long core admission conservative; test only split-style or local heat classification. Do not repeat broad VWAP-distance/TP expansion.
next_experiments.name: Pullback Deep-Heat Split Research
next_experiments.primary_metric: pullback_long PnL retention, pullback worst MAE, total PnL/exposure hour, and total score.

next_experiments.config_bias: Run a bounded expansion/holdout only if it can be isolated to call_wall_acceptance_long. Do not loosen global call-volume or DEX gates across profiles.

next_experiments.primary_metric: Standalone call_wall_acceptance_long PnL/exposure, trade count, worst MAE, and total PnL retention.

next_experiments.config_bias: Isolate STALE_0DTE/no-0DTE behavior only; avoid affecting VALID_0DTE or the single EXPIRED_0DTE winner.

next_experiments.primary_metric: Fallback PnL/exposure, fallback worst MAE, total net profit retention >=98%, and unchanged VALID_0DTE PnL.
